narrative:
Warren City 7D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 677 registered voters, with 67.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.4 percentage points.
